name: Ador Kingbond E6013 — rutile welding electrodes
description: Ador Welding Limited Kingbond E6013: rutile type, medium coated; operates at low OCV; Ador cites X-ray quality weld deposit and vertical-down capability; typical uses include general fabrication in steel plants, light construction, shipbuilding and pipes, storage tanks, furniture, automobile bodies, and joining grades such as IS 2062 / IS 226. Indicative price — store dry and follow the datasheet. Official page: adorwelding.com (Kingbond E6013).

name: Ador Supabase X Plus E7018 H4R — low-hydrogen electrodes
description: Ador Welding Limited Supabase X Plus E7018 H4R: basic coated, low-hydrogen iron powder type; medium penetration; high deposition rate; radiographic weld quality; all-position. Typical applications include boilers and pressure vessels, heavy structures under dynamic loading, shipbuilding, storage tanks, bridges, pipelines, penstocks, and joining grades such as IS 2002 / IS 2062 steels per Ador. Store dry; bake and handle per manufacturer. Indicative price. Official page: adorwelding.com (Supabase X Plus E7018 H4R).

name: Superon SUPER OPTIMAL 308L-15 — stainless steel stick electrode (E 308L-15)
description: Superon Schweisstechnik India — SUPER OPTIMAL 308L-15: AWS/SFA A5.4 E 308L-15; stainless steel rutile coating for 308/308L-type applications. Manufacturer highlights: self-lifting slag; easy strike and re-strike; seven-layer packing with VAC pack; spatter-free smooth weld deposits; suitable for AC and DC power sources; 2.5 mm diameter called out for thin sheet welding; low heat input contact type for long-life joints with minimised dilution and HAZ; no red-hot tendency for full-length welding. Typical mechanical properties cited on the product page: tensile strength ≥520 N/mm²; elongation A5 ≥40%; impact ≥47 J at −196 °C; welding conditions DC(+). Pack sizes and weights (plastic tube / lbs equivalents) per Superon literature — confirm diameter, pack, and lot with your enquiry. Indicative price — store dry and follow SDS / datasheet. Official product page: https://www.superoncorp.com/product/super-optimal-308l-15

name: Superon SUPER OPTIMAL 316L-15 — stainless steel stick electrode (E 316L-15)
description: Superon Schweisstechnik India — SUPER OPTIMAL 316L-15: AWS/SFA A5.4 E 316L-15; extra-low carbon 316L-type stainless electrode for molybdenum-alloyed austenitic grades and corrosive service. Product page cites international approvals including CE, ABS, BV, LRS, and CWB. Typical properties in Superon’s comparison table: tensile strength ≥550 N/mm²; elongation A5 40%; impact ≥50 J at −60 °C (page also notes impact performance at −196 °C); welding conditions DC+. Marketed features: superior weldability; self-peeling slag; controlled fluidity; all-position welding. Vacuum-packed line — confirm diameter, pack size (2 / 5 / 10 / 20 kg and plastic tube options per Superon), and lot with your enquiry. Indicative price — store dry and follow SDS / datasheet. Official product page: https://www.superoncorp.com/product/super-optimal-316l-15

name: Superon SUPER OPTIMAL 309L-15 — stainless steel stick electrode (E 309L-15)
description: Superon Schweisstechnik India — SUPER OPTIMAL 309L-15: AWS/SFA A5.4 E 309L-15; low-carbon 23Cr-12Ni-type electrode for joining stainless to carbon/low-alloy steels, buffer layers, and related dissimilar work. Product page lists international approvals for the SUPER OPTIMAL 309L range (e.g. CE, ABS, BV, LRS, CWB). Typical properties cited: tensile strength ≥550 N/mm²; elongation A5 ≥30%; impact 60 J at room temperature; welding conditions DC+. Features highlighted: excellent weldability; strong mechanical properties; vacuum-packed range. Packaging notes cover inner vac packs (2 / 5 kg), outer packs (10 / 20 kg), plastic tube options, and lbs equivalents — confirm with Superon for your SKU. Indicative price — store dry and follow SDS / datasheet. Official product page: https://www.superoncorp.com/product/super-optimal-309l-15

name: Ador CHAMP ARC 201 — MMA / TIG inverter welder
description: Ador Welding Limited CHAMP ARC 201: inverter-based output with constant current; IGBT at high frequency; MMA and TIG (scratch-start TIG in TIG mode); encoder current setting with digital display; over-voltage and over-temperature protection. Indicative listing — confirm ratings, input supply, and duty cycle for your site. Official details and datasheet: adorwelding.com (CHAMP ARC 201).

name: Ador Champ 400 X — three-phase heavy-duty MMA welder
description: Ador Welding Limited Champ 400 X: three-phase inverter DC SMAW power source — high efficiency and power factor; SMD-based reliability; built-in VRD (approx. 6–9 V DC OCV) with ON/OFF switch; Hot Start and Arc Force on panel; suited to heavy-duty work; auto-reset protections for input over/under-voltage, over-temperature, and single phasing. TIG possible with an external HF unit per Ador. Indicative price — confirm supply, installation, and duty with Ador literature. Product page: adorwelding.com (Champ 400 X).

name: Ador Champ T400 — three-phase inverter MMA welder
description: Ador Welding Limited Champ T400: three-phase inverter DC welder with high efficiency and power factor; suited to long-distance welding and cellulosic electrodes including types such as 6010, 7010G, and 8010G; SMD technology; arc force adjustment on the panel; compact and portable; designed for long welding and return cable runs (Ador cites 100 m + 100 m). Auto-reset protections: input over/under-voltage, over-temperature, single phasing. Indicative price — confirm ratings and site conditions with Ador. Official page: adorwelding.com (Champ T400).

name: Ador Champmig 400 — heavy-duty MIG welding machine
description: Ador Welding Limited Champmig 400: heavy-duty MIG (GMAW) power source for industrial use — digital panel for welding setup; about 25% more energy efficient than conventional machines per Ador; maximum power factor 0.95; strong dynamic response for arc behaviour; 2T and 4T modes; dynamic inductance control; crater voltage and crater current on the digital panel; pinch-off pulse to limit globule formation; automatic weld stop; normal or creep wire feed selection on the front. Indicative price — confirm input supply, wire feeder, torch, and duty with Ador literature. Datasheet PDF and details: https://adorwelding.com/product/champmig-400-champmig-400/

name: Ador Holder King Cool-600 — insulated electrode holder
description: Ador Welding Limited Holder King Cool-600: crocodile-style type B fully insulated electrode holder — copper alloy main conductor with brass jaws for reliable electrode contact and continuous duty cycle. Handle, lever, and spatter protection guards use fire-retardant, heat-resistant materials per Ador. Lightweight; suitable for welding cables up to Al 120 / Cu 70 mm² (per manufacturer). Indicative price — confirm compatibility with your cables and application. Product page and literature: https://adorwelding.com/product/holder-king-cool-600-2/

name: Kepro Chain Pulley Block — manual, ISI marked
description: Kepro Technologies Pvt. Ltd. — KEPRO PLUS manual chain pulley block (ISI): compact, efficient design for lifting and contracting use; premium-grade components; ISI-marked chain pulley block combining quality, safety, and performance. Load chain in best-in-class material (JSW, Jindal, or TATA steel per Kepro). Capacity range 0.5 to 20 tonnes; lifting height as per requirement — request quote for your tonnage and lift. Indicative list price — confirm model, capacity, and delivery with Kepro. Details and catalogue: https://www.kepro.in/mannual-chain-pulley-block.php

name: Kepro Flat Webbing Sling — ISI marked (IS 15041:2001)
description: Kepro Technologies Pvt. Ltd. — flat webbing slings ISI marked to IS 15041:2001. Heavy-duty polyester webbing, abrasion resistant, colour coded per international standards, made from 100% high-strength polyester yarn; safety factor from 5:1 to 7:1 per range. Capacity up to 40 tonnes; length up to 20 m (longer lengths can be customized). Indicative price — confirm capacity, length, and end fittings with Kepro. Product details and catalogue: https://www.kepro.in/flat-webbing.php

name: VENUS V-410 V — fold-flat FFP1 respirator (valve, large filter)
description: Venus fold-flat filtering facepiece respirator V-410 V — “Fold Flat” style with large filter area; class FFP1 S for solid dust and mist; manufacturer states M.U.L. up to 4× OEL. Item numbers on catalogue: 14146 yellow stapled elastic, 14147 grey stapled elastic. Highlights (per Venus product literature): transparent valve vent for performance visibility and fit checks; embedded nose clip (no exposed metal); sewn head straps and cut-seal edge; anti-clogging for multi-shift use; latex-free textile elastic; multi-layer micro-fine filter media (pre-filter, fine filter, comfort layer); unique fit adjusters on the head band; Stay Cool butterfly vent valve; compatible with other PPE. Typical applications cited include painting/powder coating, pesticide spraying, sand blasting, metal fabrication, pharma bulk handling, and battery lead handling. FFP2 and FFP3 classes also exist in the range — confirm class, colour, and packing with your enquiry. Official product page: https://venusohs.com/product/venus-v-410-v/

name: VENUS V-44+ — fold-flat V-shape FFP1 respirator
description: Venus filtering facepiece respirator V-44+ — fold-flat “V” style for compact storage when not in use; class FFP1 S for solid dust and mist; manufacturer states M.U.L. up to 4× OEL. Catalogue item numbers (per Venus): 110498001 yellow stapled — bag of 50; 140490201 yellow stapled — blister pack of 3. Features highlighted on the range include lightweight construction; embedded nose clip inside the media (no metal exposure or loose parts, leak-proof fit); elastic welded/stapled outside the filter area; knitted elastic for comfort; multi-layer micro-fine filter media (pre-filter, fine filter, comfort layer); unique fit adjusters on the head band; compatibility with other PPE (eye, hearing, head). Example applications cited include grain duct and pollen dust, spinning and weaving, food processing, medical staff and patients, housekeeping, and road pollution. Confirm class, packing, and colour on enquiry. Official product page: https://venusohs.com/product/venus-v-44/
